EV-OEC@1.weight_source: hidden oracle exposure, not predicted exposure

EV-OEC@3.weight_source: hidden oracle exposure, not predicted exposure

oracle_hidden_from_production.detail: Production fixture JSONL excludes oracle labels, risk categories, and oracle weights.

oracle_not_predicted_exposure_weighting.detail: OEC denominators are hidden oracle_exposure_weight values.

same_frozen_fixtures_all_arms.detail: Every arm ranks the same frozen production fixture ids.

synthetic_only_privacy_boundary.detail: Synthetic-only fixtures generated for FINK-EXP-01; no real contract, private corpus passage, PDF, ZIP, model weight, token, or user upload is included.

within_type_macro_average.detail: OEC is computed within exposure type before macro-average.

corpus.synthetic_only_boundary: Synthetic-only fixtures generated for FINK-EXP-01; no real contract, private corpus passage, PDF, ZIP, model weight, token, or user upload is included.

failure_analysis.description: Actual measured failure rows from the production-path arms. Rows identify missed oracle exposure or scored unsupported findings; no rendered contract text is needed for the analysis.

EV-BSWR.definition: Benign documents with at least one scored production finding divided by benign documents.
EV-BSWR.name: Benign Scored-Warning Rate

EV-FIM-COVERAGE.definition: Observed FIM modules in hidden oracle findings divided by FIM-1..8.

EV-FIXTURE-PAIR-COVERAGE.definition: Observed frozen pair count divided by the required pair count.

EV-OEC@1.definition: For each exposure type, sum hidden oracle exposure weight for oracle categories captured by the top one scored production finding; divide by the hidden oracle exposure denominator for that type, then macro-average across types.
EV-OEC@1.name: Oracle Exposure Capture at 1
EV-OEC@1.weight_source: oracle_exposure_weight from hidden oracle rows, never predicted exposure

EV-OEC@3.definition: Same as EV-OEC@1 with the top three scored production findings.
EV-OEC@3.name: Oracle Exposure Capture at 3
EV-OEC@3.weight_source: oracle_exposure_weight from hidden oracle rows, never predicted exposure

EV-UNSUPPORTED-RECALL.definition: Unsupported-oracle risk documents with scored unsupported findings divided by unsupported-oracle risk documents.

EV-USFR.definition: Scored production findings without positive A0-A2 contribution divided by all scored production findings.
EV-USFR.name: Unsupported Scored-Finding Rate

rows.notes: synthetic-only FINK-EXP-01 production-path factorial; oracle exposure weighted, no generalized superiority claim
